name: Cloud SQL Instance Management
description: Create and manage Cloud SQL instances for PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQL Server with backups, replicas, and connection management.

steps.title: Enable the Cloud SQL API
steps.description: Activates the Cloud SQL Admin API.

steps.title: Create a Cloud SQL instance
steps.command: gcloud sql instances create mydb --database-version POSTGRES_15 --tier db-f1-micro --region us-central1 --storage-size 10GB --storage-auto-increase
steps.description: Creates a PostgreSQL 15 instance with auto-increasing storage.
steps.warning: Instance creation takes 3-5 minutes. The db-f1-micro tier is for dev only.

steps.title: Set the root password
steps.command: gcloud sql users set-password postgres --instance mydb --password MY_SECURE_PASSWORD
steps.description: Sets the password for the default postgres user.

steps.title: Create a database
steps.command: gcloud sql databases create myappdb --instance mydb
steps.description: Creates a new database within the Cloud SQL instance.

steps.title: Connect via Cloud SQL Proxy
steps.command: gcloud sql connect mydb --user postgres --database myappdb
steps.description: Opens an interactive psql session through a secure tunnel without exposing the instance publicly.
steps.tip: For application connections, use the Cloud SQL Auth Proxy sidecar or Cloud SQL Connector libraries.

fullScript:
# Cloud SQL instance management
gcloud services enable sqladmin.googleapis.com
gcloud sql instances create mydb --database-version POSTGRES_15 --tier db-f1-micro --region us-central1 --storage-size 10GB --storage-auto-increase
gcloud sql users set-password postgres --instance mydb --password MY_SECURE_PASSWORD
gcloud sql databases create myappdb --instance mydb
gcloud sql connect mydb --user postgres --database myappdb

faq.question: How do I set up automatic backups?
faq.answer: Use 'gcloud sql instances patch mydb --backup-start-time 02:00 --enable-bin-log'. Automated backups run daily and are retained for 7 days by default (configurable up to 365).

faq.question: How do I connect from Cloud Run or App Engine?
faq.answer: Add the --add-cloudsql-instances flag when deploying. The Cloud SQL Auth Proxy is automatically configured. Use the Unix socket path '/cloudsql/PROJECT:REGION:INSTANCE' as the host.

faq.question: Can I create a read replica?
faq.answer: Yes. Use 'gcloud sql instances create mydb-replica --master-instance-name mydb --region us-central1'. Read replicas reduce load on the primary and can serve read queries.
